intentSynonyms: show me my channels in slack
see all my channels in slack
description: List channels in the Slack workspace with optional pagination

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 1000)

types.description: Comma-separated channel types to include (default "public_channel" — options: public_channel, private_channel, mpim, im)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response for fetching the next page

exclude_archived.description: Set to true to exclude archived channels from results (default false)
